notes: Seed catalog for fully-automated (API) Gumroad listing. Keep copy compliant: avoid earnings/income claims unless explicitly disclosed + approved.

items.name: 73 Cold Email Subject Lines (PDF)
items.description_md:
73 subject lines you can copy/paste for cold outreach.

Includes:
- 73 subject lines grouped by intent (curiosity, pain, social proof, quick question)
- Short guidance on when to use each

No earnings claims. Results vary by offer, list quality, and deliverability.

items.name: Funnel Teardown Pack (PDF)
items.description_md:
A concise teardown of 5 creator funnels (structure, pages, offer ladder, and what to test).

No earnings claims. Results vary by niche, execution, and traffic.

items.name: AI Automation Blueprint (PDF)
items.description_md:
A practical blueprint for building small automations that save time.

Includes:
- Workflow selection rubric
- Common patterns (scrape -> normalize -> enrich -> notify)
- Checklists for reliability and safety

items.name: Solopreneur Ops System (PDF)
items.description_md:
A lightweight operating system for running a solo business (tracking, execution cadence, and decision loops).

No earnings claims. This is an organizational system.

items.name: Cold Email Playbook (PDF)
items.description_md:
A cold email playbook: structure, sequencing, and practical examples.

No earnings claims. Results vary and depend on your offer, list quality, and sending reputation.
